summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Calendar widget view feature in Practice Management. All 7 features tested and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Calendar widget implementation is well-done using react-day-picker with proper styling
Event highlighting using modifiers is correctly implemented
Legend component is clear and properly positioned

details: Two toggle buttons present at top right of Calendar tab
data-testid='calendar-view-list-btn' for list view (List icon)
data-testid='calendar-view-grid-btn' for calendar/grid view (CalendarDays icon)
Toggle switches views correctly between list and calendar widget view
CalendarWidget component from shadcn/ui renders correctly
Days with events are highlighted with blue background (rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3))
Month navigation works (prev/next buttons)
February 2026 shows days 8-28 highlighted with events
Today's date (22) shows different styling
Clicking on any day updates the selected date panel
Selected day panel shows full date (e.g., 'Sunday, 22 February 2026')
Event count displayed (e.g., '14 events scheduled')
Events are filtered and shown for selected day only
Badges shown at top right of selected day panel
'4 meetings' badge (blue)
'2 court' badge (red)
'3 deadlines' badge (amber)
Badges update based on selected day's events
Each event in calendar view has 3-dot (MoreVertical) action button
Clicking action button opens dropdown menu
Dropdown shows 'Edit' option with edit icon
Dropdown shows 'Delete' option with red trash icon
Legend displayed below calendar widget
Shows 4 event types with colored dots:
Meeting (blue dot)
Court (red dot)
Deadline (amber/yellow dot)
Appointment (green dot)
When selecting a day with no events, shows 'No events on this day' message
Calendar icon displayed in empty state
'+ Add Event' button shown for empty days
Button opens event form with selected date pre-filled

context_for_next_testing_agent: Calendar widget view feature fully implemented and tested. Uses react-day-picker (CalendarWidget from shadcn/ui) with proper event highlighting using modifiers. All interactive features working: view toggle, day selection, event badges, action menus, legend, and add event for empty days.
